programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep108: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament More Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hop-aboard as we’re fishing the Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament hoping to win big. In this episode you’ll also enjoy Cayman Yoga and Wellness Adventures plus plenty of fresh, fine dining.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep707: Paddling Poland
programme.desc: Facing Waves discovers the incredible culture, and explores the amazing landscapes around Mazury, Poland.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Ice Fishing vs Propane
programme.desc: Ice Fishing vs. Propane In this episode, Mike takes a long-time AmeriGas employee out ice fishing and then learns the ins and outs of the world of residential propane! Stay tuned for the end and see how many fish were caught!

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep107: Hawaii’s North Shore…A Battle For The World Title
programme.desc: For two Australian surfers from the Gold Coast, best friends Mick Fanning and Joel Parkinson, it's been a long year of competition before arriving in the tropical waters of Hawaii. They're poised to battle it out for first place on the Championship Tour and the honor of being the World Champion. The North Shore of the island of Oahu is home to some of the best waves on the planet, and none more notorious than the Banzai pipeline.

programme.title: Blue World Ep811: Jojo the Friendly Dolphin + Gator Hole Cave in the Turks Caicos Islands
programme.desc: Jonathan, Blue World's host, and his enitre family travel to the Turks Caicos Islands in search of a famous local celebrity—Jojo the friendly dolphin. Then Blue World explores a hidden cave—keeping an eye out for the alligators, for which it’s named!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep209: Boating New York City’s Waters with Scientist Neil deGrasse Tyson as Tour Guide
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, cruises the waters of New York City with Neil deGrasse Tyson as his personal tour guide.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Surfing Games
programme.desc: Up to 200 surfers from 40 nations will battle for a medal in the ISA World Surfing Games 2017. Biarritz La Grande Plage will host the event, thus celebrating the 60th anniversary of surfing’s arrival in France. The athletes will compete for the titles: Men’s Individual, Women’s Individual, National World Champion, and Relay World Champion. Join us and have a taste of the high-performance surfing to come in Tokyo 2020!

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Adaptive Surfing Championship
programme.desc: This year’s anticipated 2017 ISA World Adaptive Surfing Championship will be held in sunny San Diego in the renown La Jolla neighborhood. The physically challenged surfers participate in teams of up to eight members, and represent their home countries as they race through the waters. With various events and a large following, the Championship is a fun and unique experience; both for the surfers and its spectators.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E03 - Operation Long Tooth and Happy Kids
programme.desc: An elusive smuggler evades Game Wardens from different backgrounds. The smuggler, once discovered, has an exotic tusk in his possession. Then a story of how a dog and two amused kids leads to a bust. It's the job of Game Wardens to solve what has transpired.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E01 - Meet Island Air
programme.desc: Thousands of outdoor adventure seekers flock to Kodiak Island to experience the wilds of Alaska through hunting, fishing and wildlife viewing expeditions, and Island Air Service makes those once-in-a-lifetime quests a reality. Flying in fog, rain, snow or sleet and moving outdoorsmen, locals, supplies and materials to the farthest corners of the island, It's all in a day's run for a Kodiak bush pilot and the staff and crew of Island Air.

programme.title: Making Out

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo
programme.desc: The water is cool and the girls are hot, what more could you want? Jump in and go for a swim, then wash up for a fun night out because the beach has nothing but sand and babes.

programme.title: Nightmoor Manor
programme.desc: Elspeth, a plucky orphan girl turned governess, takes a post at Nightmoor Manor, and meets her brooding new employer.

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: Breakdown Lane
programme.desc: When Kirby's SUV stalls in the desert, she must overcome the elements and the lurking undead to get home. Her only companion is Max, the Emergency Car Service Rep trapped in his office by the zombies.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A group of medical students undertake some silly and frightening endeavors in order to pledge a fraternity

programme.title: The Red House

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment

programme.title: God Can Use This Too
programme.desc: Just because you didn’t choose it, doesn’t mean God won’t use it. Start to view the challenges and obstacles you face through the lens of God’s limitless creativity.

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You
programme.desc: Don’t judge any one part of your life in isolation or let unmet expectations define your future. God’s not finished with your story, and He didn’t bring you this far to let you turn back now.

programme.title: The Storm Has Its Purpose
programme.desc: In “The Storm Has Its Purpose,” Pastor Rich Wilkerson reminds us to take courage — because God is in control.

programme.title: Running For A Reason
programme.desc: Our expectation of God must not be that there will never be anything chasing us in life but that we are chosen while we are chased. In “Running For A Reason,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that even though God has placed something significant in us, certain development can only happen in the caves of our lives.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel in conflict with his children. Camila defends them and tells him that her children are afraid of him. Max is willing to meet Rosa, even at the risk of his life and Camila organizes a party to unmask Elda.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Committed to forget Nicolás Del Casal, Victoria decides to reciprocate the love Sergio offers her, although Sergio believes that the young Guanipa is not yet ready to fall in love again. Florencia wants to make sure that Nicolás did not believe Victoria when she claimed to have been a victim of the late Rosendo Zapata, who in life wanted to abuse her. Hilario is overcome with sadness as he wanders through the nooks and crannies of the Cantarrana hacienda, where he remembers being a man that everyone respected and of whom now only the remains are left. At nightfall, Fernanda leans on Leopoldo to impose a punishment on his daughter Eugenia for having lied to him; Eugenia tries to manipulate her father, as she begs him to let her leave, but the young Alcoy is forced to stay at home. Nicolás is approached by his wife, who wants to attend an event that Nicolás refuses to go to, but suddenly changes his mind when he learns that the event is none other than the same art auction to which Sergio invited Victoria.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In the middle of the art auction, the Del Casal couple has a furtive encounter with Victoria and Sergio; Florencia believes that Victoria is furious to see her with her beloved Nicolás, but Victoria clarifies that Nicolás is only with her for commitment and nothing else. Carlos Hansen shows up at Cantarrana to propose a deal to Hilario: he will move to another country with Adelaida if Guanipa signs the divorce; Hilario is not willing to accept without putting up a fight. Fernanda has made the decision to send her daughter Eugenia to a Swiss boarding school, because Yosmir's bad influence is what has caused the girl's rebellious attitudes. After having signed the divorce, Adelaida is happy because now she will be able to rebuild her life with Hansen, who lets her know that they will have to move to meet Hilario.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio gives instructions to Pedro about the new plan to kill his brother. In an attempt to recover the million dollars that a third party collected with the stolen check, Ricardo and Paulina go before the bank manager who confirms that the operation was clean and cannot be reversed. Lorena receives a package from her husband.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis plots a mass shooting for the party. Alberto is caught up in memories of the past, including a letter where Lorenita declared her love for him. At the Oceanography Institute, Isabel surprises Malena with a bouquet of flowers as a show of 'admiration' for her new appointment. Guillermo warns Lorena of the danger her son faces for having fled the Corona household without killing Marco Aurelio.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In a mixture of enjoyment and pain, Pastora sees Cirilo's corpse lying in the morgue.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Lara Portillo is arranging to purchase DNA tests to prove that the young woman does not carry the blood of any of the Santa Maria's in her veins.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: El Bosque del Silencio
programme.desc: UNA MUCHACHA CONOCIO A UN HOMBRE POR INTERNET Y SE ENAMORA DE EL UN DIA DECIDIO IR A VERLO EN PERSONA, AUNQUE SU FAMILIA SE LO PROHIBIO ELLA DE CUALQUIER MANERA SE FUE PERO CUANDO LO VIO NO PODIA CREER LO QUE PASO

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano

Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: El Bosque del Silencio
programme.desc: UNA MUCHACHA CONOCIO A UN HOMBRE POR INTERNET Y SE ENAMORA DE EL UN DIA DECIDIO IR A VERLO EN PERSONA, AUNQUE SU FAMILIA SE LO PROHIBIO ELLA DE CUALQUIER MANERA SE FUE PERO CUANDO LO VIO NO PODIA CREER LO QUE PASO

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Martí Noticias
programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
